# PyFluent AI Context Index

This file provides a compact index of high-value context for AI tools.

## Core Documents

- AGENTS.md: Root agent operating guidance for this repository.
- .github/copilot-instructions.md: Copilot-specific guardrails and workflow.
- README.rst: Project overview, install, and usage examples.
- CONTRIBUTING.md: Contribution policy and process pointers.

## Build, Test, And Tooling

- pyproject.toml: Package metadata, dependencies, pytest markers/options.
- Makefile: Common build, test, docs, and codegen tasks.
- .pre-commit-config.yaml: Formatting and lint checks run by hooks.
- .github/workflows/ci.yml: CI expectations and environment settings.

## AI-Focused Guides

- docs/ai/repo-map.md: Where key components live in the tree.
- docs/ai/codegen-rules.md: Generated code boundaries and regeneration flow.
- docs/ai/test-playbook.md: Test command matrix and environment constraints.
- docs/ai/domain-glossary.md: Fluent and PyFluent terminology.
- docs/ai/change-checklist.md: Practical pre-PR checklist.
